action.reasoning: Observation: NLinear (simple linear model) achieved MSE=0.472 in 57s for 42 epochs. Time remaining ~12 min. GPU unusable. Analysis: We can try more expressive but still fast linear model like DLinear (decomposition into trend + seasonal) which may outperform NLinear. We can train ~2-3 min and still iterate. Decision: Implement DLinear, add to model.py, update train/predict scripts, train 100 epochs with early stopping, submit eval.
